endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Flows.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Engagements for the Flow.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements
endpoints.description: Triggers a new Engagement for the Flow
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements/{EngagementSid}/Context
endpoints.description: Retrieve the most recent context for an Engagement.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{ENGAGEMENTSID}} with a real engagementsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements/{EngagementSid}/Steps
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Steps for an Engagement.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{ENGAGEMENTSID}} with a real engagementsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements/{EngagementSid}/Steps/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a Step.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{ENGAGEMENTSID}} with a real engagementsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements/{EngagementSid}/Steps/{StepSid}/Context
endpoints.description: Retrieve the context for an Engagement Step.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{STEPSID}} with a real stepsid. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{ENGAGEMENTSID}} with a real engagementsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Retrieve an Engagement
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Engagements/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete this Engagement and all Steps relating to it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Executions for the Flow.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions
endpoints.description: Triggers a new Execution for the Flow
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{ExecutionSid}/Context
endpoints.description: Retrieve the most recent context for an Execution.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{EXECUTIONSID}} with a real executionsid. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{ExecutionSid}/Steps
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Steps for an Execution.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{EXECUTIONSID}} with a real executionsid. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{ExecutionSid}/Steps/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a Step.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{EXECUTIONSID}} with a real executionsid. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{ExecutionSid}/Steps/{StepSid}/Context
endpoints.description: Retrieve the context for an Execution Step.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{EXECUTIONSID}} with a real executionsid. Replace {{STEPSID}} with a real stepsid. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Retrieve an Execution
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update the status of an Execution to `ended`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Flows/{FlowSid}/Executions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete the Execution and all Steps relating to it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLOWSID}} with a real flowsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Flows/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a specific Flow.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Flows/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Flow.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
